dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
💜Sponsor: Vivanti
🤝Organizer: Kara Jennison (Vivanti) and Albert Cheng (dbt Labs)
🏠Venue Host: Vivanti
🍕Catering: Pizzas and drinks
To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy
📝Agenda

5:30pm - 6:15pm | Food and networking
6:15pm - 6:45pm | Presentation by Virgin Australia
6:45pm - 7:15pm | Presentation by dbt Labs
7:15pm - 7:45pm | Networking & wrap-up

🎤 Presentations
#1 Virgin Australia's dbt and Databricks journey

Speaker: Nathan Bowen
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mrnathanbowen/
Synopsis: TBC

#2 Recap of Coalesce Vegas event

Speaker: Shabbir Khanbhai (Solutions Architect, dbt Labs)
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shabbir-khanbhai-772b10ba/
Synopsis: Coalesce is dbt Labs' annual event. In this session, we'll be highlighting the key product announcements made from Coalesce.

Wed, Nov 27, 2024 · 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM AEST

dbt labs Brisbane Meetup

Level 29, Riverside Centre, 123 Eagle St Brisbane, QLD 4000 · Brisbane

Brisbane dbt Meetup
D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Brisbane dbt Meetup
4.5
13 reviews
Details

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you may catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modelling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue: Morgan's Financials, Level 29, Riverside Centre, 123 Eagle St Brisbane, QLD 4000
🍕Catering: Pizzas & drinks
🤝Organizer: INTELLIGEN

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

📝Agenda
● ● 5:00 - 5:30 | Check in/Registration (30 min)

● 5:30 - 5:45 | Welcome Remarks by Meetup Host (Rajiv Tarafdar) and Introduction to the team (15 min)
● 5:45 - 6:00 | Latest News and Offerings from dbt labs + Tech Q&A (15 min)
● 6:15 – 6:40 | Customer Transition / Knowledge / Experience + Q&A (20 mins) - Subhankar Dasgupta, Head of Integration at Morgans Financials
● 6:40 – 7:00 | Customer Transition / Knowledge / Experience + Q&A (20 min) - Alex Stenlake, Head of Data/Analytics at Picklebet

● 7:00 | Closing Remarks by Meetup Host (5 min)
■ Call for speakers for next meetup
● 7:00 - 7:30 | Networking + Reception (30 min)

EVENT DETAILS:
The venue will open at 5 pm on 27th November 2024. Please sign up at the registration desk and collect your wristband to join the event. Introductions and networking will begin at 5:30 pm. Beverages and Catering will be available for our participants.

Customer Speaker Session 1
Subhankar Dasgupta - Head of Integration

Topics - Business value delivered through integration of dbt & Snowflake
AI Use case in context to Morgans. Implementation in progress.

Customer Speaker Session 2
Alex Stenlake, Head of Data/Analytics at Picklebet

Topic - From Reactive to Proactive: Improving DBT Pipeline Health with Observability

Our venue has capacity limits, so please only RSVP if you intend to come and reach out to rajiv.tarafdar@intelligengroup.com or DM in dbt Slack If you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-brisbane channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).
----------------------------------
dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 30,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Subhankar Dasgupta and Alex Stenlake

Subhankar Dasgupta
A seasoned technology leader with a strong foundation in Java development and integration, Subhankar has a proven track record of delivering high-impact projects for global clients and overseeing critical digital transformations. Since joining Morgans. He has contributed to key initiatives, including migrating legacy applications to Salesforce, developing digital client portals, transitioning databases to Snowflake, and deploying Power BI reporting. As the Head of Integration and he leads Data Engineering and other enterprise technologies. Currently overseeing Integration, Data, and Process Automation, his team focuses on creating reusable data assets, enterprise APIs, and modernising legacy applications, with a strong emphasis on security and governance.

Alex Stenlake
Alex Stenlake heads up Data and Analytics at Picklebet, where he’s focused on building smarter systems to make data work harder and better. With a penchant for automation and a deep interest in analytics engineering, Alex has been exploring how data observability can improve reliability and streamline workflows. His team’s work is all about finding practical ways to transform data into decisions - without the drama.
Alex’s background in Python, data science, and AI is complemented by a strong focus on aligning data capabilities with business objectives. He has led initiatives to improve data governance and design strategies that embed insights directly into operational decision-making. At Picklebet, Alex drives the development of systems that ensure analytics are not just reliable but deeply integrated into how the organization executes its goals.

Nick Bragg is Morgan's Data and Analytics Architect helping unlock capability and derive value from data. Community Slack AMA
Network event

122 attendees from 39 groups hosting

Hosted by Brisbane dbt Meetup

Brisbane dbt Meetup
4.5
13 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Alex Welch, Head of Data @dbt Labs
Topic: BI Tools & Semantic Layer
When: June 27 @ 4pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Whether you’re looking at flight data, sales figures, consumer transactions, or biometric stats — access to the correct sources + a well-trained user + BI tools + dbt = data that works!!
This month we have Alex Welch, Head of Data at dbt Labs, to answer questions and discuss more about BI tools, analytics trends & the Semantic Layer!

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-merge channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more

dbt allows teams to ship trusted data products, faster. dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust.

Hi Everyone, Thank you for joining us at the local-brisbane dbt meetup last night.

It was great to meet so many wonderful individuals yesterday and get to know more about you and your journey. We are very fortunate to have you in this community.

please remember to join the dbt community on slack and share your experiences, feedback and pictures if you took any. Please do let us know how we can improve the next one as well.

Please share your requests, experiences and any other information related to DBT in this channel. As shared with your yesterday, please explore the other channels that are more specific to your needs on the business, technical or other aspects of DBT. Feel free to reach to me directly on @Rajiv Tarafdar(slack) / [masked] / https://www.linkedin.com/in/rajivkumartarafdar/

Have a wonderful week ahead.

Get started with DBT

## Join us to walk through an end to end simple project setting up dbt Cloud at the KeyData offices in Queen St Brisbane. The session will be lead by Rabi Abbasi from dbt setting up a dbt environment from scratch to a working functional stage.Bring your laptop and have a trial dbt Cloud account ready before you arrive to play!

This meetup is at KeyData on Level 3, 344 Queen St, Brisbane. 2 blocks from Central Station.

Speaker
Rabi Abbasi

Rabi is a Partner Engineer at dbt Labs. He has extensive consulting experience, delivering solutions in the space of financial services, retail, education and telecommunications.
